allow: PowerShell($body = @{email="smoketest_$\(Get-Random\)@example.com"; password="Password1234"; name="Smoke"} | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)`n$\($r.Content\)" } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\) -- $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import sqlite3; con=sqlite3.connect\('instance/capstone.db'\); cur=con.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(urlSubmissions\)'\); [print\(r\) for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]")

PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import sqlite3; con=sqlite3.connect\('instance/capstone.db'\); con.execute\('ALTER TABLE urlSubmissions ADD COLUMN websiteID INTEGER REFERENCES websites\(websiteID\) ON DELETE SET NULL'\); con.commit\(\); cur=con.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(urlSubmissions\)'\); [print\(r\) for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]")
PowerShell($env:FLASK_APP="run.py"; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m flask db migrate -m "add risk_level and confidence to urlSubmissions" 2>&1 | Out-String)
PowerShell($env:FLASK_APP="run.py"; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m flask db upgrade 2>&1 | Out-String; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe _schema_audit.py 2>&1 | Out-String)
